nasb.text: And when He had taken a cup and given thanks, He gave it to them, saying, “Drink from it, all of you;

esv.text: And he took a cup, and when he had given thanks he gave it to them, saying, “Drink of it, all of you,

cnv.text: 耶穌又拿起杯來，祝謝了就遞給他們，說：“你們都喝吧，

ccb.text: 接着又拿起杯来，祝谢后递给门徒，说：“你们都喝吧，

csbs.text: 接着，他拿起杯来，祝谢了，递给他们，说：“你们都来喝，
